IOU Sustainability and Innovation Center– IDEMA Collaboration

Istanbul Okan
University Sustainability and Innovation Center and IDEMA signed a cooperation
protocol! 🤝

Sait
Beyazyürek

, General Manager of

İhtiyaç
Haritası

,

Gizem AKTAS

,
Deputy General Manager of IDEMA, Rector

Prof. Dr. Güliz MUĞAN

,
Vice Rector Prof. Dr. Gökçe TUNÇ, Director of Sustainability and Innovation
Center

Assoc.
Prof. Dr. Ceyda OVACI

, Director of Gender Studies Application and Research
Center Prof. Dr. Umut AZAK, Director of Graduate Education Institute
Assoc.

Prof. Dr. Edin
Güçlü SÖZER

, Secretary General

Orhan TUNC

also attended
this meeting which strengthened our cooperation.

We are excited
for new collaborations after our meeting where we discussed opportunities for
joint work in the field of social development and sustainability!
